question.text: All payments received/made by brokers from/to clients must be strictly by:

answer.text: Account payee crossed cheques/demand drafts or direct credit through NEFT or other RBI-allowed modes
Cash or cheque at broker's discretion
Any mode including cash for amounts below Rs 20,000

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All payments must be by account payee crossed cheques/DDs or direct credit through NEFT or any other RBI-allowed mode. **The Trap:** There is no exception for small amounts. All transactions must have electronic/documented trail. **Cross-Exam Context:** Payment mode restrictions are tested as part of compliance requirements. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Members must maintain audit trails of electronic fund transfers to verify funds come from their clients only.
